alfredo-manicotti.name: Alfredo Manicotti
instructions: Prepare all of the ingredients. Preheat the oven to 204°C.
In a saute pan over medium-high heat, add sausage. Cook and crumble until no longer pink.

In a saucepan over medium-high heat, add butter and garlic powder. Once melted, whisk in flour. Cook for 2 minutes, then whisk in chicken broth. Cook for 2 minutes, then whisk in heavy cream. Add parmesan, whisk and cook until fully melted. Remove from heat.
In a bowl, combine ricotta cheese, Italian sausage, garlic, and 1 cup of mozzarella.

Pour a thin layer of sauce into the bottom of the 13×9 baking dish. Use a teaspoon to push the filling into each pasta tube. Line up in the baking dish. Pour remaining sauce over top of filled pasta tubes. Sprinkle dish with the remaining mozzarella and parsley.
Bake for 30 minutes or until golden brown and bubbling.
Serve warm.

all-fruit-smoothies.name: All-fruit Smoothies
instructions: Pour pineapple juice into a blender and add banana, strawberries, and blueberries. Cover and blend until smooth, about 1 minute. Pour into 2 glasses.

and-chickpea-salad-with-avocado-comedera.name: And Chickpea Salad with Avocado
and-chickpea-salad-with-avocado-comedera.original_name: Ensalada de garbanzos con aguacate fácil y rápida
instructions: It pics spotted into cubes of medium or small size.
The onion can be cut into thin julians.
Wash the chickpeas well before using them, you can put them under the water pits in a paddle and then let them run for a few minutes.
To make the salad simply mix all the ingredients into a bowl.
Put the salt and oil at last, stir well and put a few minutes in the refrigerator before eating.
Serving some sesame sees to decorate and give an extra touch of aste.

angel-food-cake-argiro.name: Angel Food Cake
instructions: In a bowl, sift the flour, corn flour, salt and add 3/4 cup of the total ground sugar.
Save the rest of the sugar for the meringue.
Mix the solid materials with wire and put them aside.
In the mixer's bowl, add the whites and cremarium and at medium speed beat for 1.5 to 2 minutes until the meringue starts to make body and very soft peaks.
Gradually and as rain pour the fine sugar we have before grinding, strengthening the mixer's speed and beat for 4-5 minutes until the meringue is stabilized, polished and makes peaks standing.
Then, add the vanilla and after it is lost inside the meringue we stop the mixer.
The flour must fall into the mixture of the cake gradually and well sifted.
Add the flour to the meringue and fold gently with a soft spatula from the bottom up carefully without losing the meringue volume.
Drop the sieved flour in 3 doses.
Carefully pour the Angel food cake into a deep cake pan with 25 cm diameter.

aperol-slushy.name: Aperol Slushy

ingredients.prep: hulled, halved, plus more, sliced, for serving

instructions: Stir honey and 1 oz. warm water in a small bowl to dissolve. Combine honey syrup, strawberries, tequila, Aperol, and lime juice in a blender and freeze 3–12 hours (mixture will be partially frozen).
Add 2 cups ice to mixture and blend until thick and smooth. Divide among glasses and garnish with lime wheels and strawberry slices.

apple-and-quince-crumble-lezzet.name: Apple And Quince Crumble
instructions: 1. Unu, cube in the form of cold butter and powder sugar pit in a bowl of fingers to your friends like sand.
2. Peel and peel the shell of apples and the moon;p in shape.
3. Calculum, add cinnamon and sugar.
4. Share the prepared fruity mixture into heat resistant containers.
5. Unlu mixture is sprinkled without pressing fruits &uuml.
6. Last, add aer ça meal of butter.
7. Bake the oven set to 170 degrees, until the dough is fraught.
8. Take it from the oven and add vanilla ice cream to the car and serve without waiting.

apple-dutch-baby.name: Apple Dutch Baby
instructions: Bring cider, butter, brown sugar, vanilla, and cinnamon to a boil over medium-high heat in a large saucepan. Reduce heat and boil gently, whisking occasionally, until thick and syrupy, 30–45 minutes.
DO AHEAD: Syrup can be made 1 week ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. Bring to room temperature before using.
Preheat oven to 425°. Whisk eggs, milk, flour, vanilla, salt, and ½ tsp. cinnamon in a medium bowl until smooth.

Melt 2 Tbsp. butter in a 10” skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium heat. Add apple and sprinkle with brown sugar and remaining ½ tsp. cinnamon. Cook, tossing often, until apple is coated and softened, about 4 minutes. Transfer to a plate.

Wipe out skillet and heat in oven until very hot, 8–10 minutes. Carefully add remaining 2 Tbsp. butter to skillet, tilting to coat bottom and sides. Add apple to center of skillet; pour batter over. Bake until pancake is puffed and golden brown around the edges and center is set but still custardy, 12–15 minutes.
Serve drizzled with apple cider syrup.

apple-pie-pancakes.name: Apple Pie Pancakes

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal kosher salt; for table salt
ingredients.prep: use half as much by volume

ingredients.item: Peeled and grated golden delicious apples (about 6 1/4 ounces; 180g) from 1 medium apple

ingredients.prep: unpeeled and chopped into 1/2-inch pieces (9 1/2 ounces; 270g)

instructions: Prepare the Pancakes: In a medium bowl, whisk flour, baking powder, cinnamon, salt, baking soda, and pumpkin pie spice to combine. In a separate medium bowl, toss apples with brown sugar to evenly coat; let stand, stirring occasionally, until apples have released some liquid and broken down slightly, 20 to 30 minutes.

For the Apple Topping: While the apples macerate, melt butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add apples, brown sugar, cinnamon, and pumpkin pie spice and cook, stirring frequently, until apples are tender and can be pierced easily with a knife, 10 to 15 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in maple syrup; set aside, covered, in a warm place.

For the Maple Whipped Cream: In a large bowl, combine heavy cream and maple syrup. Using an electric hand mixer, whip on medium speed until medium peaks form, about 2 minutes.  Cover and refrigerate until ready to use. (Whipped cream can also be prepared in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with a whisk attachment.)

Whisk egg, milk, sour cream, melted butter, and vanilla into macerated apple mixture until well combined. Add apple mixture to flour mixture; using a whisk or flexible spatula, stir just until combined. Set a wire rack inside a rimmed baking sheet; set aside.

Heat a large nonstick griddle to medium heat (177°C/175ºC) or large nonstick skillet over medium. Using a 1/3 cup scoop, scoop batter onto griddle or skillet to form pancakes. Spread into 4-inch discs spaced 1/2- to 1-inch apart. Cook until bubbles start to appear on top of batter and bottoms are golden brown, 2 to 4 minutes, adjusting heat as needed to prevent overbrowning. Carefully flip pancakes and cook until bottoms are lightly golden and pancakes are cooked through, 2 to 4 minutes. Transfer to prepared wire rack. Repeat with remaining batter.
Serve pancakes immediately; garnish with apple topping, chopped toasted pecans, maple syrup, and maple whipped cream.

apple-pie-with-spiced-apple-caramel-sauc.name: Apple Pie With Spiced Apple-caramel Sauce

ingredients.item: All-purpose flour plus more for surface
One 9"-diameter glass or ceramic deep pie dish

instructions: Pulse flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a food processor to combine. Add butter and pulse until mixture resembles coarse meal with a few pea-size pieces of butter remaining. Transfer to a large bowl; drizzle 1/3 cup ice water over and, using a fork, mix gently, adding more water by the tablespoon if too dry, just until dough comes together in clumps. (Dough should be on the dry side; it will hydrate as it rests.)
Form dough into 2 disks. Wrap in plastic; chill at least 1 hour.
DO AHEAD: Crust can be made 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.

Place a rack in lower third of oven and preheat to 375°. Roll out 1 disk of dough on a lightly floured surface to a 13" round. Transfer to pie dish. Pick up edges and allow dough to slump down into dish, letting excess dough hang over dish. Chill until firm, about 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, toss apples, granulated sugar, brown sugar, vinegar, butter, cinnamon, nutmeg, salt, allspice, and ¼ cup flour in a large bowl. Pour filling into crust.
Roll out remaining disk of dough into a 12" round; place on top of apples. Press top and bottom crusts together to seal. Trim overhang to 1/2" and crimp edges.
Cut 5 small slits in top crust to allow steam to escape. Beat egg and 1 Tbsp. water in a small bowl. Brush egg wash over top crust and sprinkle with raw sugar. Chill in freezer 15 minutes.

Place pie dish on a foil-lined rimmed baking sheet and bake 30 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 350°, rotate pie, and continue baking, tenting with foil if crust is browning too quickly, until juices are bubbling and crust is golden brown, 50–60 minutes longer. Transfer to a wire rack; let cool at least 4 hours before slicing.
Serve pie with Spiced Apple-Caramel Sauce (click for recipe) alongside.
DO AHEAD: Pie can be made 1 day ahead. Let cool completely and store wrapped loosely at room temperature.

apricot-and-cranberry-stuffed-roast-pork.name: Apricot And Cranberry Stuffed Roast Pork Loin With Port Wine Pan Sauce

ingredients.prep: or similar amount of your favorite dried fruit

instructions: Adjust oven rack to upper-middle position and heat oven to 250 degrees. Heat oil in a small skillet over medium-low heat. Add whole garlic cloves and cook, stirring occasionally, until soft and golden, about 5 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon; reserve oil.

Turn pork loin fat-side down. Slit lengthwise, almost but not quite all the way through, to form a long pocket, leaving a 1/2-inch border of unslit meat at each end. Brush cavity with some of the reserved garlic cooking oil, and sprinkle generously with salt and pepper and 1 Tb. of the rosemary. Line cavity with sauteed garlic and apricots; sprinkle in cranberries. Tie loin together with kitchen twine or heavy-duty string at 1 1/2-inch intervals.

Brush with remaining oil, and sprinkle generously with salt and pepper. Set roast, fat-side up, diagonally or curved (so it fits) on a large, lipped cookie sheet or jellyroll pan. Warm 1/4 cup apple jelly along with the minced garlic and remaining rosemary. Brush mixture onto meat.

Roast until a meat thermometer stuck into the center registers 125 to 130 degrees. (Start checking at about 1 1/2 hours.) Remove from oven; raise oven temperature to 400 degrees. Brush loin with pan drippings, return to oven, and continue to roast until the loin is golden brown and a meat thermometer stuck into the center registers 63°C (63 degrees C), about 20 minutes longer. For even more attractive coloring, broil until spotty brown, 3 to 5 minutes.

Let roast rest 15 to 20 minutes; transfer to a carving board. Stir juices around pan to loosen brown bits. Pour through a strainer into a small pan, and stir in port, chicken broth and remaining 2 Tbs. of jelly; bring to a simmer. Mix cornstarch with a couple of tablespoons of cold water; whisk into sauce. Simmer until lightly thickened. Slice pork and serve with a little sauce.

apricot-linzertorte-with-quark-whipped-c.name: Apricot Linzertorte With Quark Whipped Cream
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C. Butter 10-inch springform pan. Process nuts and 1/4 cup flour in processor until nuts are finely ground. Transfer to medium bowl. Whisk in 1 cup flour, cocoa powder, cinnamon, 3/4 teaspoon salt, and cloves. Using electric mixer, beat 14 tablespoons butter and 1 1/4 cups sugar in large bowl. Beat in egg, then egg yolk and orange peel. Gradually stir in dry ingredients. Spoon 1 1/2 cups batter into pastry bag fitted with 3/8-inch plain round tip; set aside. Spread remaining batter in pan.
Bake torte bottom until golden, about 35 minutes. Cool in pan on rack 10 minutes. Maintain oven temperature.

Using some of batter in pastry bag, pipe border around edge of torte bottom. Spread preserves evenly over torte bottom. Pipe remaining batter over preserves in lattice pattern, 5 to 6 strips in each direction. Bake until lattice is firm to touch and preserves are bubbling, about 40 minutes. Cool completely. DO AHEAD Can be made 3 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.
Beat cream in bowl until peaks form; beat in quark. Dust torte with powdered sugar. Serve with quark whipped cream.
If you don't have a pastry bag, spoon the batter into a resealable plastic bag. Twist bag at top, grasp top firmly, and cut off enough of one corner to form 3/8-inch-wide opening.

apricot-cherry-and-graham-cracker-crumbl.name: Apricot, Cherry, And Graham Cracker Crumble
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Combine apricots, cherries, cornstarch, 2 Tbsp. brown sugar, and a pinch of salt in a large bowl. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean; reserve pod for another use. Toss to combine and transfer to a shallow 1 ½-qt. baking dish.

Combine crackers, butter, and a pinch of salt in a medium bowl. Work butter into crackers with your fingers until mixture comes together. Add nuts and remaining 2 Tbsp. brown sugar and work in with your fingers until combined. Scatter over fruit.
Bake crumble until topping is golden brown and fruit is bubbling, 35–45 minutes. Let cool slightly before serving.

arabica-argiro.name: Arabica
instructions: Boil the pens in salted water for 2 minutes less than the time on the pack.
In a pot heat the olive oil and sauté the garlic with the booboubouboubouvo for half a minute, over medium heat.
Add the paste and rub it in the pot until it removes its flavors.
Add the tomatoes, melt themm with the sponge and let the sauce bottle for 10 minutes.
Salt at the end and add the pens along with some of their water.
Continue building for 2 minutes so that the sauce thinks.
Remove from heat, add fresh basil and serve immediately.
Sprinkle with cracked cheese and sprinkle with some olive oil.

aromatic-orange-pudding-teleculinaria.name: Aromatic Orange Pudding
instructions: Bring 180 g of sugar to the fire and let it boil until you get a caramel. Lay it in one shape and caramelize it. Reserve.
Coloque num tacho o tomilho, o leite e a raspa de laranja. Leve ao lume e deixe levantar fervura. Baixe o lume e deixe ferver por mais 2 minutos. Retire do lume e passe por um coador.
In a bowl, beat the eggs and yolks with the remaining sugar. Add the orange juice and stir well. Finally, add the flavoured milk and lie in caramelized form.
Place the shape in the oven, preheated at 165oC, in sea bath, for 1 hour. Let it cool down completely before deforming. Serve fresh.

atascaburras-or-ajoarriero-manchego-pequ.name: Atascaburras Or Ajoarriero Manchego

ingredients.item: 100 ml de aceite de oliva virgen extra
A handful of nuts and pits and pieces
Retirement to taste (care with salt if cod is very salty)

instructions: In a big pot, cover the potatoes with water and bring them to boiling. Cooking till they're tender, about 20 minutes.
En otra olla con agua, cocina el bacalao durante unos 5 minutos. Escurre y reserva.
Utiliza un mortero para machacar los ajos con un poco de sal hasta formar una pasta.
Once cooked, scattering the potatoes and pounding them and pounding them. Incorporates garlic and mixture paste. Add the crumped cod and mix everything.
Add olive oil little by little into a thread while mixes up to a creamy consistency.
Put in a large bowl and add several rooms of baked egg and some nuts.
atascaburras-or-ajoarriero-manchego-pequ.category: Recetas de Aperitivos, Tapas y Pinchos

avocado-cucumber-pasta-salad.name: Avocado Cucumber Pasta Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil; cook rotini at a boil until tender yet firm to the bite, about 8 minutes. Drain and let cool, 10 to 15 minutes.
Mix rotini pasta, tomatoes, cucumbers, olives, Italian dressing, Parmesan cheese, salt, and pepper together in a large bowl. Chill until flavors combine, about 1 hour.
Toss avocado with lemon juice in a bowl. Mix into the pasta salad before serving.

avocado-cups-with-pomegranate-salsa-verd.name: Avocado Cups With Pomegranate Salsa Verde
instructions: Mix cilantro, mint, oil, pomegranate seeds, lemon juice, and preserved lemon peel in a small bowl; season dressing with salt. Spoon over and into avocados; sprinkle with sea salt.
